REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: off calendar; petition for final distribution filed
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

Off Calendar Dec-09-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 4, 2021, is admitted to probate. Eileen Cotter is appointed as the Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $700,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, an appearance is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
